reasoning: Laurent Gbagbo, one of the five candidates specified in the resolution criteria, was excluded from the provisional electoral list published by the Independent Electoral Commission (CEI) on March 17, 2025. He subsequently lost his appeal to be reinstated, and an Abidjan court ruled him legally ineligible to stand in the election due to a prior criminal conviction (for which he received a pardon but not amnesty). As of late April 2025, credible sources define him as barred from running. With the final electoral list scheduled for publication by June 20, 2025, and his appeals seemingly exhausted, the condition that he 'has been removed from the electoral list or otherwise become legally ineligible to run in the 2025 presidential election' is firmly met before July 1, 2025.
